hero.slide1.title: Welcome to NetFee
hero.slide1.desc: The complete ISP billing solution in Bengali & English. Manage clients, billing, and your entire business from one powerful platform.
hero.slide2.title: Support 24/7
hero.slide2.desc: Our dedicated support team is always available to resolve your issues quickly, keeping your ISP business running without interruption.
hero.slide3.title: SMS Module
hero.slide3.desc: Send automated SMS alerts for due bills, payment confirmations, and service updates — keeping your clients informed instantly.
hero.slide4.title: Multiple Mikrotik
hero.slide4.desc: Connect and manage multiple Mikrotik routers from a single dashboard. Control bandwidth, PPPoE, and static IPs with ease.
hero.slide5.title: Payment Gateway
hero.slide5.desc: Accept online payments via bKash, Nagad, and major gateways with real-time Webhook notifications for instant reconciliation.

about.headline: Only ISP Billing Software in Bangla Language
about.subheadline: Streamline your ISP business with the most powerful billing platform built for Bangladesh.
about.body: NetFee gives you the ability to manage clients, billing, and operations without any hassle — fully available in Bengali and English. Built with all the modern features your ISP business needs to grow.
about.card1.title: Discover Opportunities
about.card1.desc: Uncover smarter ways to run your ISP. NetFee surfaces insights and tools that help you grow faster.
about.card2.title: Reach More Clients
about.card2.desc: Expand your client base effortlessly. Manage onboarding, billing, and communication from one place.
about.card3.title: Track Every Activity
about.card3.desc: Monitor employee actions, payment history, and bill collectors in real time — full visibility, zero guesswork.

about.trusted.desc: NetFee is designed to revolutionize the ISP billing process. Enhance efficiency, track payments, and grow your client base effortlessly.
